title: post v1 auth register with valid data
description: Test user registration by sending a POST request to /v1/auth/register with valid username, password, and email. Expect a 201 Created response with a user_id in the response body.

title: post v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Test user login by sending a POST request to /v1/auth/login with valid username and password. Expect a 200 OK response with a JWT token in the response body.

title: post v1 auth login with invalid credentials
description: Test user login failure by sending a POST request to /v1/auth/login with invalid username or password. Expect a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: post v1 orders with valid authorization and payload
description: Test order creation by sending a POST request to /v1/orders with a valid JWT token in the Authorization header and a valid order payload containing customer_id, items, and total_amount. Expect a 201 Created response with an order_id.

title: post v1 orders without authorization header
description: Test order creation without authentication by sending a POST request to /v1/orders without an Authorization header. Expect a 401 Unauthorized response.

title: get v1 kitchen status with valid order id
description: Test retrieving kitchen ticket status by sending a GET request to /v1/kitchen/status/{order_id} with a valid order_id. Expect a 200 OK response with kitchen ticket status and ticket details.

title: get v1 kitchen status with nonexistent order id
description: Test retrieving kitchen ticket status for a nonexistent order by sending a GET request to /v1/kitchen/status/{nonexistent_order_id}. Expect a 404 Not Found response.

title: post v1 catalog menus with valid authorization and payload
description: Test creating a menu by sending a POST request to /v1/catalog/menus with a valid JWT token and a valid menu payload. Expect a 201 Created response with a menu_id.

title: post v1 catalog menus with invalid bom entry
description: Test menu creation failure by sending a POST request to /v1/catalog/menus with a valid JWT token but an invalid BOM entry where both ingredient_id and sub_menu_item_id are set or both are null. Expect a 400 Bad Request response.

title: post v1 inventory stock restock with valid authorization and payload
description: Test restocking inventory by sending a POST request to /v1/inventory/stock/restock with a valid JWT token and a valid restock payload containing material_id, quantity, and note. Expect a 200 Created response with a transaction_id.
